signUp.title: Create your account
signUp.linkToSignIn: Already have an account? Sign in

signIn.title: Sign in
signIn.linkToSignUp: Don't have an account? Sign up

forgotPassword.title: Reset your password
forgotPassword.description: Enter your account email and we will show the same response whether the account exists or not.
forgotPassword.success: If this email exists in our system, check your inbox for the reset link.
forgotPassword.error: We couldn't process your request. Please try again.
forgotPassword.retryLater: We couldn't send the reset email right now. Please try again in a few minutes.

errors.userAlreadyExists: An account with this email already exists.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

verificationBanner.title: Verify your email
verificationBanner.description: You can use PandaTrack for 7 days without verifying your email. After that, verification is required.
verificationBanner.resendSuccess: Verification email sent. Check your inbox.
verificationBanner.resendError: We couldn't send the verification email. Please try again.

verifyGate.title: Verify your email to continue
verifyGate.description: Your 7-day grace period has ended. Verify your email to access private PandaTrack sections again.
verifyGate.helpText: You will stay signed in while you complete verification.
verifyGate.resendSuccess: Verification email sent. Check your inbox.
verifyGate.resendError: We couldn't send the verification email. Please try again.

verifyEmailStatus.expiredDescription: Verification links are only valid for a limited time. Request a new email and try again.
verifyEmailStatus.invalidTitle: This verification link is not valid
verifyEmailStatus.invalidDescription: The link may be broken or already used. Request a new verification email and try again.
verifyEmailStatus.resendSuccess: Verification email sent. Check your inbox.
verifyEmailStatus.resendError: We couldn't send the verification email. Please try again.
verifyEmailStatus.signInTitle: Sign in to request a new verification link
verifyEmailStatus.signInDescription: To resend the verification email, sign in to your account first.

verificationEmail.subject: Verify your email for {appName}
verificationEmail.title: Verify your email
verificationEmail.intro: Confirm your email to keep your account secure and private sections available.
verificationEmail.body: This link lets you finish account verification and continue using PandaTrack without interruptions.
verificationEmail.fallback: If the button does not work, use this link:
verificationEmail.footer: You received this email because a PandaTrack account was created or updated with this address.

passwordResetEmail.subject: Reset your {appName} password
passwordResetEmail.title: Create a new password
passwordResetEmail.intro: Use the secure link below to reset your password. For your security, it expires in 60 minutes.
passwordResetEmail.body: If you did not request this change, you can ignore this email and your password will stay the same.
passwordResetEmail.fallback: If the button does not work, use this link:
passwordResetEmail.footer: You received this email because a password reset was requested for your PandaTrack account.
